title: neottia ovata
intro: Neottia ovata, also known as the broad-lipped ladies' tresses, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neottia ovata include the treatment of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. Neottia ovata can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural health practices.
